batch: PalWakf Smoke Suite Auth-Aware Technical Services Hotfix
root_cause: Technical Services dashboard RPC is protected and requires authenticated admin context; the smoke suite used anon key only.
fix: Add optional authenticated access token support for protected RPC smoke checks
Classify PLATFORM_TECHNICAL_AUTH_REQUIRED as SKIP/PROTECTED when no access token is provided
Keep public view smoke tests strict HTTP 2xx
